description_ja: \S目的値・微分・ノイズ・評価費など、solverが利用できる情報を見渡す。
description_en: \SInspect the objective, derivative, noise, and cost information available to a solver.

limitations_en: \SAvailability alone does not establish accuracy, cost, or implementation quality.

description_ja: \S同一の初期点と評価予算で軌跡を比較する。
description_en: \SCompare trajectories under one initial point and evaluation budget.
limitations_ja: \S一つの問題と予算での比較であり、一般的な順位を表しません。
limitations_en: \SA comparison on one problem and budget is not a general ranking.

description_ja: \S実行可能解・局所解・gap・大域証明・Pareto集合という到達点の違いを整理する。
description_en: \SCompare feasible, local, bounded-gap, globally certified, and Pareto outcomes.

limitations_en: \SGuarantee type alone does not compare runtime, numerical error, or assumptions.

description_ja: \S更新則や探索の仕組みで代表的な最適化手法を見渡す。
description_en: \SBrowse representative optimization methods by update and search mechanism.
filter_policy_json: \S{"groups":[{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"gradient","label_en":"Gradient and second-order updates","label_ja":"勾配・二階更新","method_ids":["M_GRADIENT_DESCENT","M_MOMENTUM_SGD","M_ADAM","M_BFGS","M_NEWTON"],"question_ids":[]},{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"simplex","label_en":"Simplex and basis updates","label_ja":"単体・基底更新","method_ids":["M_NELDER_MEAD","M_SIMPLEX","M_DUAL_SIMPLEX"],"question_ids":[]},{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"population","label_en":"Population search","label_ja":"集団探索","method_ids":["M_GENETIC_ALGORITHM","M_CMA_ES","M_DIFFERENTIAL_EVOLUTION","M_NSGA_II"],"question_ids":[]},{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"surrogate","label_en":"Surrogate-guided search","label_ja":"代理モデル探索","method_ids":["M_BAYESIAN_OPT_GP"],"question_ids":[]},{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"search-tree","label_en":"Search trees and pruning","label_ja":"探索木と枝刈り","method_ids":["M_BRANCH_BOUND","M_BRANCH_CUT","M_CP_SAT","M_SPATIAL_BRANCH_BOUND"],"question_ids":[]},{"alternative_ids":[],"feature_ids":[],"group_id":"decomposition","label_en":"Decomposition and distributed updates","label_ja":"分解と分散更新","method_ids":["M_ADMM","M_ADMM_QP","M_MOEA_D"],"question_ids":[]}],"mode":"authored_groups"}

limitations_en: \SMethods with several mechanisms are shown under one representative learning category.

description_ja: \S単体の反射・膨張・収縮を二次元で追う。
description_en: \SFollow simplex reflection, expansion, and contraction in two dimensions.
limitations_ja: \S二次元の教育用軌跡であり、高次元での性能を保証しません。
limitations_en: \SThis two-dimensional educational trace does not establish high-dimensional performance.

description_ja: \S問題の特徴から手法候補へ辿る意味階層。
description_en: \SA semantic hierarchy from problem features to method candidates.

limitations_en: \SThis organizes problem descriptions; it does not rank methods.
